title: [BUG] Add image in streaming mode with exceljs
author: Ramos03
body:
I'm developing a reporting system. In study the exceljs library I verified that the streaming mode due to the volume of data, and in the tests it would suit me and it really suited me perfectly.

However, I have a problem, it does not let you add an image to the worksheet. returning the worksheet.addImage error is not function. Does anyone know how I can get around this?

comments.author: rag666
comments.body: I too encounter this limitation.  It works great in Document mode, but I am trying to switch to exceljs for building excel files explicitly for the streaming mode due to massive spreadsheets; but the workbooks I need to generate require a logo in a cell range of each worksheet.  Is this on anyone's radar to add?

comments.author: yapus
comments.body: we've just added support for `addImage` in streaming mode in [umongous/exceljs](https://github.com/umongous/exceljs) fork, not sure about pull requesting though, i was unable to get through pre-commit hooks

comments.author: nqqduy
comments.body: Hi, is there any solution yet?

comments.author: NirajSZN
comments.body: Is there any update or alternative solution to resolve this issue?

comments.author: beiding110
comments.body: Same problem. It still cannot works, any update or fix?

comments.author: AbdelkaderMkd
comments.body: is there an alternative or an update ?
